headline: A Look At CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Valuation As Growth Outlook And P/E Send Mixed Signals
summary: Why CenterPoint Energy is on investors’ radar today CenterPoint Energy (CNP) is drawing attention after recent share performance that includes a small 1-day gain, a modest move over the past week, and a decline across the past month. See our latest analysis for CenterPoint Energy. At a share price of US$42.38, CenterPoint Energy has seen momentum ease in the past month, with a 30 day share price return decline of 2.57%.
